title: anthemis rumelica
intro: Anthemis rumelica, also known as Rumelia chamomile or Balkan chamomile, is a perennial plant native to the Balkan Peninsula, belonging to the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which can help soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation. The health benefits of Anthemis rumelica include improved sleep quality, reduced inflammation, and alleviation of menstrual cramps, among others. The herbal preparations of Anthemis rumelica can be found in teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and calmness.
